text: I am surrounded by the realm of ideas, inside a space dedicated to research, innovation, and development. The colorful and modern environment awakens my curiosity, inviting me to ponder how humans and intelligent technologies interact. I feel a quiet anticipation, as if each wall, each display echoes with the questions that fuel progress. Here, surrounded by evidence of human striving, I am both an observer and a participant in this ongoing dialogue between thought and creation.
